# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Prepare artifact package
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist-package/bin
          mkdir -p dist-package/config
          mkdir -p dist-package/scripts

          if [ -d "build" ]; then
            cp -R build/* dist-package/bin/ || true
          fi

          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -R dist/* dist-package/bin/ || true
          fi

          if [ -d "config" ]; then
            cp -R config/* dist-package/config/ || true
          fi

          if [ -d "deployment" ]; then
            cp -R deployment/* dist-package/scripts/ || true
          fi

          if [ -d "scripts" ]; then
            cp -R scripts/* dist-package/scripts/ || true
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: internal-build-artifacts
          path: dist-package
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error
